name: 人类营养
subject: biology
domain_name: 营养与运输 / Nutrition & Transport / Nutrition & Transport
curriculum_points: 1 Describe diffusion as the net movement of particles from a region of their higher concentration to a region of their lower concentration (i.e. down a concentration gradient), as a result of their random movement
3 State that some substances move into and out of cells by diffusion through the cell membrane
4 Describe the importance of diffusion of gases and solutes in living organisms
5 Investigate the factors that influence diffusion, limited to: surface area, temperature, concentration gradient and distance

excerpts.text: 1 Describe diffusion as the net movement of particles from a region of their higher concentration to a region of their lower concentration (i.e. down a concentration gradient), as a result of their random movement

5 Investigate the factors that influence diffusion, limited to: surface area, temperature, concentration gradient and distance

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「人类营养」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：1 Describe diffusion as the net movement of particles from a region of their higher concentration to a region of their l…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：3 State that some substances move into and out of cells by diffusion through the… 对理解「人类营养」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
